mapper.insert: insert into studentcertificate (studentId, trainsClassId, isCertificate, CertificateNo, certificateId, QRcode) values (#{studentId},#{trainsClassId},#{isCertificate},#{CertificateNo},#{certificateId},#{QRcode})
mapper.update:
update studentcertificate set isCertificate = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select i.id as studentId,i.name,i.phone,i.sex,i.address,i.image,i.idCard,i.workUnit,c.id as studentCertificateId,c.isCertificate from studentcertificate c right join studentinfo i on c.studentId = i.id
c.trainsClassId = #{trainsClassId} and i.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')

select * from studentcertificate where id in
#{id}

select s.*,i.* from studentcertificate c join studentinfo s on c.studentId = s.id join invoiceinfo i on s.invoiceId = i.id
c.studentId in
#{classId}
and s.name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and s.invoiceId is not null and s.invoiceId is null
